dialogues.dialogue: Maki: Oh? Since when{nl} couldn't we go in?{waitkey}
Elly: Everyone's gone{nl} crazy! I feel sad for them.{waitkey}
Mark: Nanjo, you little...{waitkey}
Maki: ...Wasn't this{wait_fr:3c00}{nl} place a temple...?{waitkey}
Mark: What are you saying, Sonomura~ This is the hospital you were admitted to. You really have amnesia?{waitkey}
Nanjo: ...{waitkey}
Mark: We've no more business in this dreary place, right?{clearbox}Hurry, let's go beat Kandori senseless!
Maki: Huh?{nl} I thought this was a castle.{waitkey}
Mark: Nanjo..you little...{waitkey}
Nanjo:...{waitkey}
Nanjo: Only you and Maki can{nl} go in here, right?{waitkey}
Maki: It's been like this{nl} all along in this world.{waitkey}
Nanjo:........{waitkey}
Maki: That's right!{nl} The school is gone!{waitkey}
